Registration Portal

Register your child for BdMSO 2026.

Pick one: the BdMSO National Olympiad (Class 6 or below) or the BdMSO Quiz Competition (Class 3 or below). Create your BdMSO ID once and use it across every stage.

1

Select what to register for

Choose the BdMSO National Olympiad (Olympiad, Class 6 or below) or the BdMSO Quiz Competition (Quiz,Class 3 or below). Each student may register for only one of the two.

2

Fill in the form - 5 minutes

Student details → Guardian contact → Set password. Your BdMSO ID is issued after payment is confirmed.

3

Verify email & pay

Check your inbox for a verification link, then complete payment through the portal.

Program

Enrolling in program…

You're already registered. We'll use your existing student information - no need to fill anything in again.

🎓
Loading…
← Back to programs

Choose what to register for

Locked stages require qualification through an earlier stage - they open automatically when you're eligible.

Open · Olympiad · Class 6 or below

BdMSO National Olympiad

Your journey to Bangladesh Mathematics & Science Olympiad begins here.

Closes June 15, 2026 · 1,000 BDTRegister
Open · Quiz · Class 3 or below

BdMSO Quiz Competition

General knowledge quiz for pre-primary to Class 3 students - open to both Bangla and English mediums.

Closes June 15, 2026 · 1,000 BDTRegister
Open · Enrollment

Programs & Courses

Enroll in year-round training modules - prep courses, camps, workshops.

Rolling admissionsBrowse Programs
🔒 Locked

National Residential Camp

Three-day camp for Olympiad winners (approx. top 20-30%). 3,000–5,000 BDT.

Opens July 2026
🔒 Locked

Team Selection Test (TST)

Day-long per-subject evaluation, ~7 days after the camp. 1,000 BDT per subject.

Opens July 2026
🔒 Locked

IMSO Participation

Final 6+6 delegation to the 23rd IMSO in Indonesia. Logistics managed centrally.

Opens October 2026
BdMSO National Olympiad 2026

Please review your information

Create the guardian account

The guardian email will be used as the account login for future BdMSO portal access.

Details saved - one more step.

Your BdMSO registration form has been saved and the guardian account is now active for .

Your registration is NOT complete until payment is confirmed.
You will not receive a BdMSO ID, exam admit, or any program resources until your payment is confirmed. Go to your dashboard now to complete payment.
BdMSO ID - Pending
Your student's BdMSO ID is issued only after payment is confirmed.
Please verify your email
We've sent a verification link to your inbox. You'll need to verify before you can pay for this registration. The link expires in 24 hours. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
Go to dashboard → View student resources
